title: RNA Isolation and cDNA Synthesis
author: Shiyi Wang
materials: Zymo Research RNA Clean & Concentrator-5 kit

steps.title: Thaw cells stored in TRIzol to Room temperature
steps.instruction: Thaw cells stored in TRIzol to Room temperature .

steps.title: Add 200 µL of chloroform to...
steps.instruction: Add 200 µL of chloroform to the samples and invert to mix.

steps.title: Centrifuge the samples at 12000 x...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge the samples at 12000 x g, 4 °C, 15 minutes .

steps.title: Carefully collect the aqueous phase (top...
steps.instruction: Carefully collect the aqueous phase (top clear layer) and dispense into a 1.5 ml RNase free eppendorf tube. Be careful not to disturb the interphase!

steps.title: Add 2 µL GlycoBlue Coprecipitant and...
steps.instruction: Add 2 µL GlycoBlue Coprecipitant and 500 µL isopropanol to precipitate the RNA. Incubate for 00:10:00 .

steps.title: Wash the RNA pellet with 1 mL of 75% ethanol
steps.instruction: Wash the RNA pellet with 1 mL of 75% ethanol.

steps.title: Isolate the RNA using the Zymo...
steps.instruction: Isolate the RNA using the Zymo Research RNA Clean & Concentrator-5 kit.

steps.title: Use the qScript cDNA SuperMix for cDNA library preparation
steps.instruction: Use the qScript cDNA SuperMix for cDNA library preparation.

steps.title: Add 20 µL of ultra pure...
steps.instruction: Add 20 µL of ultra pure water to the 10 µL cDNA reaction. Pipette up and down 10 times to thoroughly mix.

steps.title: Resuspend cells in 800 µL of TRIzol
steps.instruction: Resuspend cells in 800 µL of TRIzol.

steps.title: Centrifuge the samples at 12000 x...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge the samples at 12000 x g, 4 °C, 10 minutes .

steps.title: Centrifuge the samples at 7500 x...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge the samples at 7500 x g, 4 °C, 5 minutes .

steps.title: Resuspend the RNA in 40 µL of nuclease-free water
steps.instruction: Resuspend the RNA in 40 µL of nuclease-free water.

steps.title: Add 5 µL of Zymosan DNaseI...
steps.instruction: Add 5 µL of Zymosan DNaseI and 5 µL of DNA digestion buffer to the 40 µL of RNA.

steps.title: Incubate at Room temperature for 00:15:00
steps.instruction: Incubate at Room temperature for 00:15:00 .

steps.title: Add 2 volumes ( 100 µL...
steps.instruction: Add 2 volumes ( 100 µL ) RNA binding buffer to each sample and mix.

steps.title: Add equal volume ( 150 µL...
steps.instruction: Add equal volume ( 150 µL ) of 200-proof 100% ethanol and mix.

steps.title: Transfer sample to column
steps.instruction: Transfer sample to column. Centrifuge at 16000 rcf, °C, for 00:00:30 . Discard flowthrough.

steps.title: Add 400 µL RNA Prep buffer...
steps.instruction: Add 400 µL RNA Prep buffer to column and centrifuge at 16000 rcf, °C, for 00:00:30 . Discard flowthrough.

steps.title: Add 700 µL RNA Wash buffer...
steps.instruction: Add 700 µL RNA Wash buffer to column and centrifuge at 16000 rcf, °C, for 00:02:00 . Discard flowthrough.

steps.title: Transfer column to nuclease-free tube and...
steps.instruction: Transfer column to nuclease-free tube and add 6 µL of UP-water directly to column. Centrifuge at 16000 rcf, °C, for 00:00:30 .

steps.title: Measure RNA concentration using Nanodrop
steps.instruction: Measure RNA concentration using Nanodrop.

steps.title: Incubate using the following rxn
steps.instruction: Incubate using the following rxn: 00:05:00 at 25 °C 00:30:00 at 42 °C 00:05:00 at 85 °C

steps.title: Aliquot your samples into labeled PCR tubes (~10uL per tube)
steps.instruction: Aliquot your samples into labeled PCR tubes (~10uL per tube).

steps.title: Store samples at -80 °C until ready for qPCR
steps.instruction: Store samples at -80 °C until ready for qPCR.
